steps.title: Use complementary angles
steps.content: Triangle $XYZ$ is a right triangle, so the two acute angles are complementary. That means angles $X$ and $Y$ add to $90^\circ$.

steps.title: Match sine and cosine
steps.content:
The sine of an acute angle equals the cosine of its complement. Since $Y$ is the complement of $X$, $\sin X=\cos Y$.
The answer is D.
